entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop discussed in the context of diseases prevalent in China

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: The geographical region where the specified pigeonpea diseases are prevalent

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A disease affecting pigeonpea caused by the fungus Fusarium udum

entities.name: FUSARIUM UDUM
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes fusarium wilt in pigeonpea

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA BLIGHT
entities.description: A disease affecting pigeonpea caused by Phytopthora drechsleri f.sp. cajani

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA DRECHSLERI F.SP. CAJANI
entities.description: The pathogen responsible for causing phytopthora blight in pigeonpea

entities.name: POWDERY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease affecting pigeonpea caused by Oidiopsis taurica or Leveillula taurica

entities.name: OIDIOPSIS TAURICA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes powdery mildew in pigeonpea

entities.name: LEVEILLULA TAURICA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes powdery mildew in pigeonpea

entities.name: CERCOSPORA LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A disease affecting pigeonpea caused by Cercospora spp.

entities.name: CERCOSPORA SPP.
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for cercospora leaf spot in pigeonpea

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A disease affecting pigeonpea caused by Uredo cajani

entities.name: UREDO CAJANI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes rust in pigeonpea

entities.name: PHOMA STEM CANKER
entities.description: A disease affecting pigeonpea caused by Phoma cajani

entities.name: PHOMA CAJANI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes phoma stem canker in pigeonpea
